## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md) before opening this pull request.

- [ ] I added or updated unit tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets or populated `.env` files.

- [ ] I confirmed no new programme JSON was added without a matching `source_url` field.
